jobs.title: Senior Security Engineer
jobs.jd_full:
Nansen surfaces the signal and creates winners in the future of finance. We're building a new way to trade: agentic, onchain, and fully integrated. From analytics to execution, we're the platform where investors find alpha and act on it. The Opportunity As we scale our product, staking operations, and AI-powered capabilities, security matters more than ever. We're hiring a Senior Security Engineer to strengthen our security posture across the entire engineering organisation. You'll work closely with the Head of Security and collaborate hands-on with engineering teams across the company to ensure that the systems we build are secure by design. This is a generalist security role. You'll operate across application security, cloud infrastructure security, and organizational security practices. It's ideal for someone who thrives in a high-autonomy environment, is comfortable spanning multiple security domains, and wants to have outsized impact at a growing company. What You'll Do â¢ Conduct security reviews of systems, architectures, and code â proactively identifying and addressing vulnerabilities. â¢ Serve as a go-to security advisor for engineering teams, helping them make secure design decisions. â¢ Define and implement security standards across cloud infrastructure, applications, and blockchain systems. â¢ Implement and maintain security tooling: vulnerability scanning, endpoint protection, SIEM, logging and monitoring. â¢ Secure CI/CD pipelines and deployment workflows from a security perspective. â¢ Secure internal AI tools and LLM integrations â from API key management and prompt injection prevention to evaluating the security implications of AI adoption across the organization. â¢ Manage and improve secrets management, key management, and access control practices across the organization. â¢ Define and maintain secure coding guidelines and security review processes for engineering teams. â¢ Collaborate with external providers on penetration tests and security audits, ensuring findings are prioritized and remediated. â¢ Participate in incident response: investigation, containment, root cause analysis, and post-incident improvements. â¢ Support compliance and audit readiness by implementing required security controls and maintaining documentation. What We're Looking For â¢ Strong understanding of cloud security (AWS, GCP, or similar), container security, and network security fundamentals. â¢ Hands-on experience implementing and operating security tools (SIEM, vulnerability scanners, endpoint protection, cloud security tooling). â¢ Experience with secrets management, key management, and encryption best practices. â¢ Experience securing AI/LLM tooling, agent-based systems, and modern developer platforms. â¢ Familiarity with securing CI/CD pipelines and developer tooling. â¢ Solid understanding of compliance framew

jobs.title: Product Engineer
jobs.jd_full:
Weâre looking for a frontend-focused engineer whoâs excited to help Hemi build tools that support patients and therapists, cares about making a real difference, and enjoys working closely with a small, hands-on team.

Hemi is building a digital platform that supports patients and therapists between clinical sessions. The company is especially excited about the opportunities AI unlocks to enhance both sides of the experience â from an AI pain coach that helps patients stay engaged, supported, and motivated between appointments, to a clinical copilot that helps therapists work more efficiently and make better-informed decisions with richer insights and smarter workflows.

Relevant experiences:

  • Strong experience with React Native and TypeScript
  • Solid frontend fundamentals and care for UX quality
  • Product-minded approach and curiosity about users and clear and kind communication style
  • Comfortable using English in daily work communication
  • High integrity, ownership, and accountability and experience working in startups or scale-ups

Nice to have:

  • Familiarity with Kubernetes or cloud infrastructure
  • Experience in regulated or data-sensitive environments
  • Experience building multi-sided platforms
  • Familiarity with the company's stack: VS Code, Opencode AI, GitHub & GitHub Actions, Linear, Figma, Slack, Google Workspace, Sentry, Metabase and Mixpanel

Accountabilities:

  • Build and improve patient-facing and clinician-facing product features. We're looking for a Product Engineer with a strong frontend focus who enjoys building products end to end.

  • Own frontend implementation of key user journeys. This is a role with a lot of trust and autonomy, paired with clear ownership and responsibility.

  • You will work closely with UX and product in a small, caring team that values good communication, integrity, and thoughtful decision-making.

  • Take responsibility for the quality of what you ship. You care as much about what you build and why as how you build it.

  • Translate complex workflows into clear, maintainable code

  • Contribute to backend or API work when needed

  • Help evolve the product as Hemi grows

Why You'll Love Working With Us:
